applies_to: all recording bundles in this directory recorded on or before 2026-07-21 (the 14 legacy bundles)
notes: Operator confirms every character, card, relic, and ascension is unlocked on the recording profile; all bosses seen (multiple A20 clears incl. Defect victory). locked_cards/locked_relics are explicit empty arrays per the v1 contract. note_for_yourself_card unknown-null: treat per Java default (no note active) unless a bundle's Neow options contradict, in which case flag rather than guess.
